title: Fermented Potato Russian Stir-fry
description: A tender and midnight-craving dish that combines fermented potato with a savory seasoning blend for a unique twist on traditional Russian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat your wok or non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and minced garlic to the pan, sautéing until fragrant.
Fold in salt and red pepper flakes for a touch of spice.
Gradually add diced potatoes into the pan, ensuring they are evenly coated with the seasoning mixture.
Sprinkle fermented black tea leaves over the potatoes and cook until the potatoes turn golden brown and become tender.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
